name: Gimmick Puppet Nightmare
name_jp: ギミック・パペット－ナイトメア
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 face-up Xyz Monster. You can only Special Summon "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" once per turn this way. When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" from your hand or GY. If this card is Special Summoned, you cannot Special Summon any monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Gimmick Puppet" monsters.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 face-up Xyz Monster. You can only Special Summon "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" once per turn this way. When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" from your hand or GY. If this card is Special Summoned, you cannot Special Summon any monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Gimmick Puppet" monsters.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 face-up Xyz Monster. You can only Special Summon "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" once per turn this way. When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Gimmick Puppet Nightmare" from your hand or GY. If this card is Special Summoned, you cannot Special Summon any monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Gimmick Puppet" monsters.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
